description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every pull request to the master branch. Define four ubuntu-18.04 jobs: mpi, mpi-stubs-fft, mpi-stubs-kokkos-exact-fft, and bigbig. Each job checks out the repository, configures and builds using cmake, and uploads artifacts. The mpi job also installs dependencies, tests with ctest, and makes adjustments for sh.
